title: Tags (the # kind) in Updates
excerpt: It would be great if updates could have tags in them, even if they are called something else like “flags” (I am NOT talking about @mentions).  The use case would be for team members to tag or flag updates posted by other…

posts.author: mattm8913 (Matthew McVay)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if updates could have tags in them, even if they are called something else like “flags” (I am NOT talking about @mentions). The use case would be for team members to tag or flag updates posted by other team members for discussion at the next team meeting. This would reduce meeting time by being able to focus only on those tasks/items that need to be discussed rather than our current approach of reviewing all of the team’s open tasks.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: This can be done, if you use a tag in updates. Then at your weekly meeting, you would simply do a ‘search everything’ for those tags?
